RunId.description: Unique identifier for the compliance run. Example: SOC2-2026-001. Pass through to output exactly as received. Do not modify.

ControlId.description: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria control identifier. Example: CC6.1. Pass through to output exactly as received.

RiskLevel.description: Risk level of the compliance finding. Allowed values: LOW, HIGH, PASS. Pass through to output exactly as received.

ConfidenceScore.description: Confidence score of the compliance assessment. Number between 0 and 100. Use as-is — do not recalculate or modify. Output as string.

Finding.description: Detailed description of the SOC 2 compliance finding. Used to determine ControlCategory, WorkflowToExecute, RootCause, BusinessImpact, and RecommendedRemediation.

RunId.description: Pass-through of the input RunId value. Do not modify.

ControlId.description: Pass-through of the input ControlId value. Do not modify.

RiskLevel.description: Pass-through of the input RiskLevel value. Allowed values: LOW, HIGH, PASS.

ConfidenceScore.description: Pass-through of the input ConfidenceScore as a string. Do not recalculate or modify. Example: '92' not 92.

ControlCategory.description: Determined from the Finding using Workflow Selection Rules. One of: Access Control, Multi-Factor Authentication, User Access Review, Security Monitoring, Backup and Recovery, Change Management, Documentation and Evidence, Incident Response, Vendor Management, Data Protection.

RootCause.description: Root cause of the finding based on the ControlCategory. Follow Root Cause Guidelines strictly.

BusinessImpact.description: Business impact of the finding based on the ControlCategory. Follow Business Impact Guidelines strictly.

RecommendedRemediation.description: Concise, actionable remediation recommendation based on the finding and ControlCategory. Follow Remediation Guidelines strictly.

WorkflowToExecute.description: Remediation workflow determined by Workflow Selection Rules. One of: DisableInactiveUsers, EnableMFA, VerifyBackupPolicy, CollectMissingEvidence, NotifySecurityTeam.

AuditNotes.description: Audit-ready notes summarizing the remediation decision, actions to take, and evidence retention requirements for SOC 2 compliance.
